title: Domina Tagge's starship
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:9dominaship.jpg]] |name=Domina Tagge's starship |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation=[[Order of the Sacred Circle]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Where did that ''ship'' come from, Threepio?''"
"''Master Luke and his patrol seem to have ''rescued'' it, your highness--|Leia Organa and C-3PO|[[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]]}} '''[[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge's]] starship''' was the vessel three envoys from [[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]] took to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. The craft was shot-up by [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and forced to land on the jungle moon after [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] destroyed the TIEs. {{Ship-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 35}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tagge, Domina's starship}} [[Category:Starships]]
